headline: Cheiron Raises $8M Seed Led by Menlo Ventures to Build the Operating System for Drug Programs
summary: Cheiron Founders Cheiron co-founders (from left): Harshit Gupta, co-founder and chief technology officer; Minseok Bae, co-founder and CEO; and Jason Park, co-founder and chief product officer. headline: Starbucks’ Stock Down 17% In Five Years
summary: Brian Niccol has brought fresh energy to Starbucks, but a recovering brand still faces a relentless army of rivals and a stock that trails the broader market by a wide margin over five years. Can momentum alone close that gap?

headline: Starbucks (SBUX) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
